name: recoil_app_load_zbd_and_setup_sensor_tracker
description: RecoilApp::LoadZbdAndSetupSensorTracker starts the ZBD/engine path, stores skip-intro mode, then either sets an explicit ZBD path or initializes the mission id/flags on the HUD sensor tracker.
